card.description: Cyberpunk card with a glowing border.
card.css: .neon-card { position: relative; padding: 1.5rem; border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--primary), transparent 35%); background: linear-gradient(145deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--surface), white 3%), var(--surface)); overflow: hidden; } .neon-card::before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, color-mix(in srgb, var(--primary), transparent 85%), transparent); transform: translateX(-100%); transition: transform .5s; } .neon-card:hover::before { transform: translateX(100%); } .neon-card > * { position: relative; z-index: 1; }

default.css: .neon-card-default h2 { color: var(--primary); text-shadow: 0 0 12px color-mix(in srgb, var(--primary), transparent 35%); }

magenta.css: .neon-card-magenta { border-color: var(--secondary); } .neon-card-magenta h2 { color: var(--secondary); text-shadow: 0 0 12px color-mix(in srgb, var(--secondary), transparent 35%); }

button.description: Neon button with a click pulse effect.
button.css: .neon-button { position: relative; padding: .65rem 1.1rem; border: 1px solid currentColor; background: transparent; font-weight: 750; letter-spacing: .06em; text-transform: uppercase; cursor: pointer; transition: color .2s, background .2s, box-shadow .2s; } .neon-button.is-pulsing { animation: neon-plugin-pulse .35s ease; } @keyframes neon-plugin-pulse { 50% { transform: scale(.96); } }

cyan.css: .neon-button-cyan { color: var(--primary); box-shadow: inset 0 0 12px transparent, 0 0 12px color-mix(in srgb, var(--primary), transparent 55%); } .neon-button-cyan:hover { background: var(--primary); color: var(--primary-contrast); box-shadow: 0 0 24px var(--primary); }

magenta.css: .neon-button-magenta { color: var(--secondary); box-shadow: 0 0 12px color-mix(in srgb, var(--secondary), transparent 55%); } .neon-button-magenta:hover { background: var(--secondary); color: white; box-shadow: 0 0 24px var(--secondary); }

heading.description: Heading with a chromatic glitch effect.

glitch.css: .neon-heading { position: relative; width: fit-content; color: var(--text); font-size: clamp(2.5rem, 9vw, 7rem); line-height: .95; letter-spacing: -.04em; text-transform: uppercase; } .neon-heading::before, .neon-heading::after { content: attr(data-text); position: absolute; inset: 0; pointer-events: none; opacity: .65; } .neon-heading::before { color: var(--primary); transform: translate(2px, -1px); clip-path: inset(0 0 48% 0); } .neon-heading::after { color: var(--secondary); transform: translate(-2px, 1px); clip-path: inset(52% 0 0); }

default.css: .neon-terminal { position: relative; overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius); background: #020207; color: #c8ffe8; box-shadow: 0 0 30px rgba(0,0,0,.5); } .neon-terminal header { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: .4rem; padding: .55rem .75rem; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); background: #111126; } .neon-terminal header span { width: .65rem; height: .65rem; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--danger); } .neon-terminal header span:nth-child(2) { background: var(--warning); } .neon-terminal header span:nth-child(3) { background: var(--success); } .neon-terminal header strong { margin-left: .4rem; color: var(--text-muted); font-size: .75rem; } .neon-terminal pre { display: grid; gap: .4rem; min-height: 8rem; margin: 0; padding: 1rem; overflow-x: auto; } .neon-terminal code { display: block; font-family: ui-monospace, monospace; } .neon-terminal button { position: absolute; right: .6rem; bottom: .6rem; padding: .35rem .55rem; border: 1px solid var(--primary); background: #020207; color: var(--primary); }
default.js: document.querySelectorAll('.neon-terminal').forEach((terminal) => terminal.querySelector('button')?.addEventListener('click', async (event) => { const text = [...terminal.querySelectorAll('code')].map((line) => line.textContent).join('\n'); await navigator.clipboard.writeText(text); event.currentTarget.textContent = 'Copied!'; }));

class.gradient-text: color: transparent; background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--primary), var(--secondary)); background-clip: text;
